title: ROM model not friendly for SymbiYosys K-Induction mode

features.name: combinational rom via case statement
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with a case statement that maps multiple input values to constant output values, implementing a ROM-like lookup table

features.name: rom modeled as initialized reg array
features.description: Code should include a reg array with multiple entries initialized via an initial block, modeling ROM behavior for formal verification

features.name: indexed read from reg array in formal rom model
features.description: Code should include an assignment that reads from an indexed position in a reg array, used when modeling ROM for formal verification

features.name: case default with unknown value assignment
features.description: Code should include a case statement default branch that assigns an unknown value 'x, which can leave ROM values unconstrained in formal induction

features.name: assertion in combinational always block
features.description: Code should include an assert statement inside a combinational always block for formal property verification
